IN COORDINATION WITH NWS CTP, A PRELIMINARY EF1 TORNADO BEGAN SOUTH OF BROCKWAY NEAR ROUTE 219 AND HARVEYS RUN RD AND CONTINUED NORTHEASTWARD INTO ELK COUNTY PA TO SOUTHWEST OF BROCKPORT. DAMAGE DOCUMENTED THUS FAR INCLUDES SNAPPED AND UPROOTED TREES, PROJECTILE-IMPALED ROOFS, FACIAL STRUCTURAL DAMAGE AND A TOPPLED TRUCK. ADDITIONAL GROUND AND AERIAL SURVEYS WILL BE CONDUCTED BY NWS AND COUNTY EMAS DURING THE WEEK.
